---
title: UQRUG 68
draft: false
editor: source
date: '2026-02-26'
description: '**Overview**: Positron<br /> **Questions**: ...'
categories: meeting
toc: true
toc-depth: 5
echo: true
eval: false
---

## Topic: Positron

-   [Positron website](https://positron.posit.co/)
-   [Report Positron issues on GitHub](https://github.com/posit-dev/positron/issues)
-   [Recording of the presentation](https://youtu.be/Qn8MOEisYAU)

Script written during the presentation:

``` r
#### Introducing Positron ####

num1 <- 42
# Ctrl + Enter: run from script
# Alt + -: assignment operator

# Ctrl + Shift + M: pipe
my_nums <- 2.345 |> 
  round(digits = 2) |> 
  rep.int(10)

# F1: help pages

# define a function
greeter <- function (name) {
  paste("Hello", name, "!")
}

greeter("Nick")

# some things still don't work as well: this opens in a separate window
data()
# also: no "Packages" tab to manage and install them

# load some data
library(ggplot2)
data(msleep)
msleep

# plot
p <- ggplot(msleep, aes(sleep_total, sleep_rem, colour = vore)) +
  geom_point()
p

# interactive
library(plotly)
ggplotly(p)

#### headings do work! ####

#### command palette ####

# ctrl + shift + P

# integrates Git and Quarto!
```

## Attendees

| Name     | Where are you from? | What brings you here?    |
|----------|---------------------|--------------------------|
| Clarissa | APS (Canberra)      | Keep up to date with R   |
| Cameron  | Library / SMP       | Learn and help a little  |
| Sandhya  | SMP                 |                          |
| Nick     | Library             | Here to help and learn   |
| Steph    | Library             | Here to help and present |
